tools.name: search_clients
tools.description: Search Lead Stampede's public client directory. Returns matching businesses with contact info, services, and ratings. Supports filtering by city, business type, and free-text query across name, description, and industry.

tools.name: get_client
tools.description: Returns the full public Agent Card for a single Lead Stampede client by slug. Includes business details, contact info, services, hours, reviews, and booking URL.

tools.name: list_business_types
tools.description: Returns the distinct business types available in the Lead Stampede public client directory.

tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: Returns the distinct cities served by public Lead Stampede clients. Useful for discovering which locations have businesses in the directory.
